Sound Familiar?

You Didn’t Build a $500K+ Company
to Stay Stuck Here

📞

Your phone only rings when someone remembers your name

Referrals built your business — but they can’t scale it. One quiet month and the whole pipeline dries up.

🗑️

You’re buying leads that waste your time

Angi, Thumbtack, HomeAdvisor — you pay upfront for “leads” that ghost you, lowball you, or were never going to hire anyone.

👀

Your competitor shows up on Google — you don’t

They’re not a better painter. They just show up first when homeowners search. That’s the only difference — and it’s costing you jobs every week.

You already know the problem. You’re world-class on the job site — and invisible on Google. We fix that.

The Paint & Profits System

Two Google Channels.
One Unfair Advantage.

Built exclusively for painting companies doing $500K+ per year. 95% of painters ignore both channels — or screw them up. We’ve spent years perfecting them so you show up first when homeowners search, without wasting money on ads that don’t convert.

The Promise
✓ 10X ROI GUARANTEE OR YOU DON'T PAY

The 10X Guarantee — Or You Don't Pay.

★★★★★ 5.0 · 5-star rating on Facebook

Here's the deal. In your first 90 days with us, we'll generate at least 10x your investment in booked painting jobs. If we don't, we refund every dollar.

No asterisk. No fine print.

The math

Your investment (Tier 1) $3,750
Average painting job value ~$5,000
Jobs needed to hit 10x in 90 days just 7
Minimum you get back $37,500

Or one decent commercial job. That’s all it takes.

Our worst-performing painter clients hit this in month 2.

Not For Everyone

We Don't Work With Just Anyone.

We only work with painters. That's the entire business.

We only take one painter per service area — because if we worked with two painters in the same city, we'd just be competing against ourselves. So if you sign up and your area opens, that area is yours.

Painting companies doing $500K+ per year only. You need to be at this level to handle the lead volume we generate — and to make the 10x math work in your favor.

No painter who isn't licensed and insured.

That's it.

Check If You Qualify
Common Questions

Real Questions From Real Painters

How fast will I see results?

Most painters see calls coming in within the first 14 days from GBP optimization alone. LSA usually takes 30 days to fully ramp. The 10x ROI clock runs for the full 90.

I don’t have a Google Business Profile. Will you create one for me?

Absolutely. We can set up your Google Business Profile from scratch for a small additional fee — nothing crazy. Once it’s live, we get to work ranking you in the top 3 of the local map pack as fast as possible.

What's the catch with the guarantee?

No catch. We make money when you stay. So we only sign you if we're confident we can hit 10x. We turn down ~40% of painter inquiries.

Do I need to be on Facebook or Instagram?

No. This is 100% Google. If you want social, we'll talk about it separately later.

Can I cancel after the term?

Yes — nothing's locked in past the term you paid for. Most painters renew.

Do you also run Facebook ads or Google Search ads?

Not in the Starter or Pro tiers. We've found GBP + LSA outperforms paid ads for painters by a wide margin, so we don't water it down.

Not Quite Yet

You're Not A Fit Yet — But Here's What To Do

We only work with painting companies doing $500K+ in annual revenue, because that’s the level where we can reliably deliver 10x. If you’re not there yet, here’s what to do:

  1. Focus on doing 10–15 jobs/month manually first
  2. Stack reviews on Google (free, takes 6 months)
  3. When you cross $200K — come back, we'll be ready
